resultList.dtldesc: Experience spacious luxury with this exquisite 3BHK flat for sale in Raheja Vistas, Nacharamdesigned to elevate your lifestyle with thoughtful amenities and premium finishes. Nestled in a thriving neighborhood, this home offers serene living without compromising on modern convenience.Property Specifications This ready-to-move 3 BHK flat offers a thoughtfully designed living space in a newly constructed building, located on the 12th floor of a 14-storey tower. With a super built-up area of 1715 sqft, the home is ideal for families seeking comfort, functionality, and a peaceful lifestyle.The flat features three spacious bedrooms, each with an attached western-style bathroom for added privacy. It boasts two balconiesone connected to the living room and the other to a bedroomoffering refreshing views of the garden, park, and swimming pool. The L-shaped layout includes a separate living and dining area that enhances the sense of openness. A functional kitchen comes with a dedicated utility area to manage daily chores with ease.Vitrified flooring lends a polished and low-maintenance finish throughout the flat. With a west-facing orientation and Vaastu compliance, the home ensures positive energy and natural light. This property strikes the perfect balance between modern design and everyday practicality in a vibrant residential community.Facilities The flat is supported by a range of essential facilities to ensure a comfortable and secure lifestyle. It includes one covered car parking space and a 24-hour corporation water supply for uninterrupted access. A 100 power backup facility is in place, ensuring seamless living even during outages. Security is well-managed with dedicated guards and CCTV surveillance, while two lifts provide smooth access across floors. Residents can also enjoy a wide array of amenities such as a swimming pool, clubhouse, gym, squash and tennis courts, and a dedicated kids play area. Landscaped parks, a multi-purpose hall, and intercom facilities further enhance the community living experience.Locality Located in a well-developed area, the project itself stands as a landmark in Nacharam, offering excellent connectivity and access to essential conveniences. Reputed institutions like DPS, along with hospitals, malls, and supermarkets, are all within a 2 km radius, making everyday life effortless. Public transport is easily available with frequent buses and autos, ensuring smooth connectivity to surrounding areas. The nearest metro station is just 4 km away, adding to commuter convenience, while banks and ATMs are also situated nearby for hassle-free access to financial services.
